input.headline: Three-quarters of parents let children miss school for ‘duvet day’

raw.headline: Three-quarters of parents let children miss school for ‘duvet day’

winner: Why don't schools ever win at hide and seek? Because they always peek out from under the duvets!

candidates.text: Even ancient Rome allowed its citizens a "toga day," but it seems modern children get the luxury of duvet days instead.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison between ancient Rome and modern children, concise and specific with a touch of historical humor."}

candidates.text: Why don't schools ever win at hide and seek? Because they always peek out from under the duvets!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks direct connection and misses the specificity of 'duvet day.' The humor is mild and relies on a common pun rather than a surprising twist."}

candidates.text: Why did the student take a break from school? Because he was feeling "duvet-rated" and needed a snow day instead!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks clarity and punch. 'Duvet-rated' is a weak pun and 'snow day' doesn't clearly connect to 'duvet day.' The humor is mild and not fully aligned with the headline's context."}

candidates.text: Why did the student bring a mattress to school? To request a "dream vacation" day!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks the surprise and specificity needed for maximum humor. The connection between 'duvet day' and bringing a mattress is weak and not clearly tied to the concept of missing school."}

candidates.text: Why don't some kids need a duvet day anymore? Because they've graduated to a king-size bed!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related but lacks strong surprise or specificity; the connection between 'duvet day' and graduating to a king-size bed feels weak and generic."}
